name: Ready Hero Fit! Rowing Fitness Adventure

reviews.review_description: I was very impressed with it. Used it first time on the rowing machine today, just 10 minutes after my usual workout. It's something I will definitely use again. The only thing a bit awkward is having to use the controllers for getting started as you need to pick them up occasionally to resume and I would prefer to be nowhere near them in case I stand on them getting off the rower. If hand control can be used totally for the app it would make it far better. Still I do recommend it for anyone using a rowing machine.. The machine is still measuring your performance and you're having fun collecting items in an interesting environment!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your review! Thanks for your helpful feedback and we're so glad you're enjoying it!

reviews.review_description: I gave Ready Hero a try with resistance bands (no rowing machine yet), and it was no joke, I'll definitely be feeling it tomorrow. I'd love to try it on an actual rower to get the full experience. The environments were delightfully colorful, and the whole thing felt like a fun preview of a fitness game that's clearly going somewhere exciting.

I’ve been hoping someone would develop a VR distraction for me to have while I use my rower. Thank you! I love your game as it makes the time pass easier. I’m looking forward to more expansion options as the game matures.

The story is fun, I can’t wait to hear what’s to come! This is a great way to exercise and have fun while you do it- if you’ve got a rowing machine, or just want to move a little more, this is the game for you!
